channel.title: Learning on Classroom
channel.description: Recent content in Learning on Classroom

item.title: Mobile App pentesting
item.description: Mobile app penetration testing cheat sheet — Android and iOS security tools, reverse engineering, SSL pinning bypass, and OWASP Top 10.

item.title: Keep Learning
item.description: Pentester learning roadmap — OS fundamentals, networking, Active Directory, web apps, recommended labs, and certifications like OSCP.
